geokguk.basis: 월지 寅 정기 甲 기준

activatedPatterns.patternThesis: Career upside is active and external advancement paths are opening.
Relationship signals are active but interpretation gaps need management.
Steady accumulation is available when execution is disciplined.
Personal authority is surfacing and people will look for direction.
Movement is active, but route quality and decision pacing now matter more than speed.
Trust-based partnership can unlock value if roles are explicit.
Results improve when you use connections, context, and introductions deliberately.
Health caution signals are concentrated, so sequencing and validation must lead.

step7_strategy_engine.riskControl: 시기 신호가 흔들리면 당일 확정을 피하고 24시간 재확인 슬롯을 넣으세요.
step7_strategy_engine.whyChosen: 지금은 방어/재정렬 국면입니다. 공격 53% / 방어 47%로 손실 방지와 재정비를 우선하세요. (E:32.6/V:17.7/S:28.5)
